frame_note: Federal annual proxies and lifetime NPV cells are different ledgers; bridge requires discount, horizon, and GE scope — never equate SIPP +$1,519/yr with NAS −$109k without a stated bridge.

parameter_claims.population: Average immigrant, forward-looking generational accounting with sustainable debt-GDP policy
parameter_claims.page_ref: pdftotext p.1 intro citing NRC Ch.7 / Lee-Miller 1997
parameter_claims.notes: Sign flips if 'no policy change' counterfactual used — policy adjustment is load-bearing

parameter_claims.value_text: Cross-section fiscal snapshots misstate PAYG pension and school-age cost timing
parameter_claims.notes: Explains why annual federal+ can coexist with lifetime school-cost phase

parameter_claims.population: Mexico inbound personal remittances (World Bank BX.TRF.PWKR.CD.DT)
parameter_claims.notes: Private transfer layer — not a credit in NAS public ledger but offsets household resources
Outflow from US household budget; rarely netted against public fiscal NPV

parameter_claims.unit: USD per weighted adult per year
parameter_claims.notes: Annual federal proxy — incomparable to NAS NPV without 75y discount bridge
Composition weight for cells, not lifetime scalar
Sensitivity 2–3% real per CBO/Trustees framing in NAS

parameter_claims.value_text: SIPP uses administrative earnings where available; imputation rules affect annual tax proxy
parameter_claims.notes: Annual bridge quality depends on imputation — not identical to IRS PUF lifetime path

generators.name: Annual→NPV bridge with scope lock
generators.prompt: For cell {education_bucket, origin_label}: (1) pull avg_federal_net from origin_fiscal_scenario_2023; (2) pull NAS individual_npv for same education cell; (3) annuitize NPV at {2%,3%,4%} over 75y; (4) label MATCH/MISMATCH and list which costs are in NAS but not SIPP (local school, public goods, GE). Block synthesis if scopes differ.
generators.retrodiction: Would have blocked equating Mexico +$1,519/yr with NAS −$109k before debate; would have flagged Lee-Miller dynamic vs cross-section mismatch and Colas ~$753/yr indirect vs lifetime objects.
generators.negative_space: Standing frame treats one annual proxy as confirming or refuting lifetime NPV.
unnamed_assumptions_surfaced: SIPP federal proxy includes same tax bases as NAS
No GE indirect taxes in annual layer

generators.name: Remittance private-layer offset
generators.prompt: Join World Bank remittance series for origin country to origin_fiscal_scenario weighted_adults. Compute remittance per weighted adult (private transfer layer). Compare magnitude to avg_federal_net — flag if private outflow rivals public net on annual basis.
generators.retrodiction: Would have surfaced Mexico ~$66B remittances vs ~$664M federal net (437k×$1,519) scale gap before treating federal layer as household budget.
generators.negative_space: Public fiscal ledger treated as complete household resource accounting.
unnamed_assumptions_surfaced: All remittances from US immigrants from that origin
Remittances should net against public costs

generators.name: PAYG pension phase shift
generators.prompt: From Abel/Lee-Miller pension papers: list taxes paid vs benefits received by age for immigrant vs native. Mark decades where immigrant appears fiscally positive (working age) vs negative (retirement). Map to SIPP age bands — test if annual federal+ is lifecycle phase not lifetime verdict.
generators.retrodiction: Would have explained NAS school-age cost vs adult tax timing and Lee-Miller PAYG caveat before using working-age cross-section as lifetime proof.
generators.negative_space: Lifetime NPV collapsed into current working-age cash flow.
unnamed_assumptions_surfaced: Immigrant remains for full benefit receipt
Social Security trust fund accounting = consolidated government

generators.name: Policy-adjustment convention audit
generators.prompt: For each generational-accounting paper: extract whether headline positive immigrant PV requires future tax increases (debt-GDP stabilization). Recompute headline under 'no policy change'. Document which citations use which convention.
generators.retrodiction: Would have caught Lee-Miller/NRC +$80k PV reliance on policy adjustment AND Green-Kotlikoff reference-dependence warning before citing generational surplus.
generators.negative_space: Generational accounting treated as objective balance sheet without policy path.
unnamed_assumptions_surfaced: Government will raise taxes to stabilize debt
Immigrants bear same future tax hike as natives

generators.name: Surge cohort vs stock annualization
generators.prompt: Compare CBO surge federal revenue path (2024–2034) to steady-state SIPP Mexico annual proxy. Label SURGE vs STOCK. Forbid using surge federal gains as lifetime NPV for 1990s stock without cohort tag.
generators.retrodiction: Would have separated CBO $897B deficit reduction (surge) from Mexico ACS stock weights before layer laundering.
generators.negative_space: One immigration wave's federal gains applied to all immigrant stocks.
unnamed_assumptions_surfaced: 2021+ surge composition equals Mexico FB education mix
Federal surge revenue amortizes into per-capita lifetime NPV

theories_tested.theory: Annual federal proxy confirms lifetime NAS sign
theories_tested.prediction: sign(avg_federal_net) = sign(NPV) for same education cell
theories_tested.duckdb_test: SELECT o.origin_label, o.avg_federal_net, n.individual_npv_2012_usd FROM life.origin_fiscal_scenario_2023 o CROSS JOIN life.npv_education_benchmarks n WHERE n.acs_education_bucket='<HS' AND o.origin_label='Mexico'
theories_tested.falsifier: Opposite signs with documented scope difference — bridge incomparable by construction

theories_tested.theory: Remittance outflow dominates federal net for Mexico cell
theories_tested.duckdb_test: SELECT 66237847600/436819 AS remit_per_adult, avg_federal_net FROM life.origin_fiscal_scenario_2023 WHERE origin_label='Mexico'
theories_tested.falsifier: Federal net larger — private layer secondary at annual scale

theories_tested.theory: 3% annuitized NAS <HS NPV near SIPP annual magnitude
theories_tested.duckdb_test: SELECT 109000/29.0 AS approx_annualized_npv, avg_federal_net FROM life.origin_fiscal_scenario_2023 WHERE origin_label='Mexico'
theories_tested.falsifier: Orders-of-magnitude gap after unit harmonization — scopes differ
